# CWE-366 safe: Race Condition within a Thread (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-366-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"sync/atomic"
)

var referralCredits int64

func CreditReferralBonus(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	user := r.URL.Query().Get("user")
	if user == "" {
		http.Error(w, "user required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return http.ErrMissingFile
	}
	newTotal := atomic.AddInt64(&referralCredits, 10)
	_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE wallets SET credits = ? WHERE user = ?", newTotal, user)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
